name: Arn-220
sourceNotes: Quick reload is 0.80s long. It triggers when you have emptied a magazine, and when you have a "quick magazine" available (indicated by the bars near your ammo count). Otherwise, a normal reload will occur.

name: Dagger (Alt.)
sourceNotes: Cannot hit multiple targets in one stab.  Has an 800ms wind-up time.

name: Dagger (Alt. w/ Backstab)
sourceNotes: Cannot hit multiple targets in one stab.  Has an 800ms wind-up time. Backstab angle is 150 degrees.

name: Recurve Bow (Uncharged)
sourceNotes: Takes ~160ms to fire the 1st shot. Various methods of optimizing TTK: https://i.imgur.com/DLfa7hv.jpeg (qm = quick melee). TTK does not account for projectile travel time. Rate of fire overall is 103 RPM. Minimum draw time is 0.08s.

name: Recurve Bow (Charged)
sourceNotes: Takes ~640ms to charge a shot. Various methods of optimizing TTK: https://i.imgur.com/DLfa7hv.jpeg (qm = quick melee). TTK does not account for projectile travel time.  Damage increases from 60 to 124 (continuously) based on how long this weapon was charged.

name: Sh1900
sourceNotes: Damage per bullet is 12*15 = 180 damage.

name: Sr-84
sourceNotes: Bullets are hitscan up until 40m, and then converted into projectiles afterwards. Air drag on the projectile is 0.08. Initial projectile velocity is 240 m/s. Gravity multiplier on the projectile is 0.55.

name: Sword (Alt.)
sourceNotes: Can hit multiple targets in a single lunge.

name: Throwing Knives
sourceNotes: TTK does not account for projectile travel time, or the initial delay when throwing the knives.  It represents more of a "time-to-death" calculation, if anything.

name: Throwing Knives (Alt.)
sourceNotes: TTK does not account for projectile travel time, or the initial delay when throwing the knives.  It represents more of a "time-to-death" calculation, if anything.

name: Cb-01 Repeater
sourceNotes: Firing the weapon will cancel the reload animation. Aim down sights zoom time is 0.24s. Vs. Medium, Repeater is stronger than Pike for ranged duals.

name: Cerberus 12Ga
sourceNotes: Deals 104 damage on hit (8 x 13 pellets), and then an extra ~31 damage from the fire DoT that last for ~2 seconds.  DoT does not stack, and it resets on every hit.

name: Cl-40 (Direct)
sourceNotes: Self damage multiplier is 1.4. Damage modifier at the edge of the inner blast radius is 75% and outer blast radius is 10%.

name: Cl-40 (Splash)
sourceNotes: Inner blast radius for maximum damage is 0.6m.

name: Dual Blades
sourceNotes: LMB combo = 2x50 damage, then 2x60 damage, then 100 damage.  Can swap-cancel the combo when started.  Swap-cancel will not optimize TTK, but quick melee will. Deflecting bullets deals 100% damage to the enemy, and 10% to you (30% if glancing).  Blocking melee hits will reduce their damage to 25%.

name: Famas
sourceNotes: 15 bullets deal 345 damage to the body, so a Heavy player may be killable within 5 bursts upon taking chip damage.  In that scenario, its TTK vs. Heavy @ Body = 1.64s, and its TTK vs. Heavy @ Head = 1.14s (with 10 headshots). Recoil recovery begins at 0.24s. Recoil recovery speed is 0.8.

name: Model 1887
sourceNotes: Firing the weapon will cancel the reload animation. Tactical reload intro animation duration is 1.5s.

name: Pike .556
sourceNotes: Vs. Heavy, Pike is stronger than Repeater for ranged duals.

name: Flamethrower
sourceNotes: (Need information about whether or not the fire DoT sticks to the player while dealing damage with Flamethrower ammo)

name: Ks-23
sourceNotes: Shots are hitscan within 25m, and then they become projectiles afterwards (with a projectile velocity of 280 m/s).  Firing the weapon will cancel the reload animation.

name: M134 Minigun
sourceNotes: TTK assumes a full ramp-up to maximum fire rate.  Major levels of spread make it 100% accurate only at extreme close range (within ~5m).  Spin-up time until minimum fire rate (500 RPM) is 0.90s.  Spin-up time until maximum fire rate is 1.60s.

name: Mgl-32
sourceNotes: Rounds detonate on impact after the 1st bounce. Maximum fuse time = 2.5s. Explosion inner radius = 2m. Damage modifier at the edge of the inner blast radius is 90% and outer blast radius is 12%.

name: Sa1216
sourceNotes: Quick reload is 0.80s long. It triggers when you have emptied a magazine, and when you have a "quick magazine" available (indicated by the bars near your ammo count). Otherwise, a normal reload will occur.

name: Shak-50
sourceNotes: Shoots 2 bullets per round, spread out horizontally, each dealing 15 damage.

name: Sledgehammer (Alt.)
sourceNotes: Cannot hit multiple targets in one swing.

name: Spear
sourceNotes: LMB combo = 65 damage, then 80 damage, then 90 damage.  Has a ~4.4m range on 1st attack then ~4.6m range on 2nd and 3rd attack (credit to u/beansoncrayons on reddit).

name: Spear (Alt.)
sourceNotes: Damage is per hit in a 3-hit combo.  Has a 3m radius.
